ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the gene (e.g., sp|P01604) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene (e.g., KV112_HUMAN) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the gene belongs (e.g., HUMAN) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  "chromosome_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  "experiment_design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., case-control, time series) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Control, Treatment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the replicate belongs to */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the replicate */,
  "batch_number" INTEGER /* Batch number of the replicate */,
  "quality_control_metrics" TEXT /* Quality control metrics of the replicate (e.g., RIN, concentration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_levels" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression level */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "log_fc" REAL /* Log Fold Change of the gene expression */,
  "z_statistic" REAL /* Z-statistic of the gene expression */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the expression level (e.g., TPM, FPKM) */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the expression level */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_replicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicate_id") REFERENCES replicates ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene expression data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
